summary: Tested 3 NEW features: (1) DELETE registrant API, (2) TriPay callback email confirmation, (3) Unified AdminNav across all admin pages. All 6 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend AdminNav verified on /admin/dashboard, /admin/contact, /admin/webinar. Delete button with Hapus/Batal confirmation works in registrant table.

minor.issue: Resend testing mode only allows sending to verified email (marissamarwahmadina@gmail.com). Test emails to other addresses fail as expected.

issues: Console warning: Recharts width/height -1 when chart container is not visible during initial render (cosmetic, non-blocking)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_DeleteTest and TEST_CallbackEmail registrants during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified working: (1) DELETE /api/admin/webinar/registrants/{id} returns 200 on success, 404 for nonexistent. (2) POST /api/tripay/callback with PAID status triggers send_payment_confirmation_email (verified in logs). (3) AdminNav component displays on all admin pages with Analytics, Leads & Kontak, Webinar links + Site and Keluar buttons. Delete icon in registrant table shows Hapus/Batal inline confirmation.

backend_api_tests: ✓ POST /api/tripay/callback with PAID status - updates status, triggers email
